patch.value: Split large command files exceeding 2000 LOC

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Audit update 2026-05-16: release static gate and full coverage pass, but large command files remain a maintainability concern visible in npm pack output and source review (extension/create/update/test families). No duplicate item created; keep this chore as the canonical LOC/complexity refactor.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Code-quality audit produced concrete low-risk split plans (re-export via existing barrels, no consumer changes): (1) sdk/cli-contracts.ts 3059 LOC -> cli-contracts/tool-option-contracts.ts (TOOL_*_OPTION_CONTRACTS data tables) + cli-contracts/enum-contracts.ts (PM_* consts + guards), root keeps flag-alias helpers + GLOBAL/SUBCOMMAND contracts. (2) core/extensions/loader.ts 3272 -> extension-capability-aliases.ts (825-990), extension-registries.ts (createEmpty* factories 1180-1221), extension-hook-runtime.ts (run*Override/Hooks 2847-3225); loader keeps discovery/activation. (3) cli/commands/extension.ts 3192 -> extension/install-sources.ts (github/npm/local 1069-1408), extension/managed-state.ts (600-752), extension/bundled-catalog.ts. Highest-value duplication: runUpdate (update.ts ~972 LOC) has 53 near-identical field blocks + ~30 non-null assertions; drive from a declarative field table [{option, metadataKey, transform}] to collapse ~500 lines. Also: shared toItemRecord() helper to remove ~15 'item as unknown as Record' + 10 'as unknown as ItemMetadata' casts.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: PR #40 review (Gemini HIGH, echoed by Sourcery): the pm update --status closed auto-route applies pre-close field updates via a recursive runUpdate then runClose = two atomic writes (non-atomic across the pair) for the rare combined case (close-only path is already a single atomic close). Fold the fix into this refactor: once runUpdate's field-application becomes a reusable mutate function (field-table), make runClose accept those field deltas so close-with-fields is a single mutateItem transaction.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Coordinator reassessment 2026-05-25 (post pm-why9): pm-why9 removed ~787 LOC from create/update/test via the mutate() field-table + parser extraction. Current LOC: create.ts=1893 and update.ts=1935 are now UNDER the 2000 threshold; test.ts=2017 (marginal). Files STILL >2000 and the real remaining scope of this chore: extension.ts=3352, loader.ts=3231, sdk/cli-contracts.ts=3097. The toItemRecord cast-helper slice from the 2026-05-21 plan is split out into pm-p5if and shipped now; the loader/extension/cli-contracts barrel splits remain the open work here. Keeping pm-mbdu open for those three.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Cast-helper slice (pm-p5if) closed + shipped in branch chore/docs-hygiene-and-item-record-cast-dedupe (full release gate green). Remaining scope of THIS chore = barrel-split the 3 files still >2000 LOC: extension.ts (3352), loader.ts (3231), sdk/cli-contracts.ts (3097). create/update/test already dropped below 2000 via pm-why9. Keeping open for those three splits.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: START: barrel-splitting 3 oversized src files. Plan: (1) cli-contracts.ts -> enum-contracts.ts (PM_* consts + isPm* guards), tool-option-contracts.ts (TOOL_*_OPTION_CONTRACTS), tool-parameter-tables.ts (PM_TOOL_PARAMETER_PROPERTIES/METADATA + PLAN_* tables); root keeps flag helpers/contracts + schema builders and re-exports. (2) loader.ts -> extension-capability-aliases.ts (alias/levenshtein/warning parse+format), extension-registries.ts (createEmpty* factories), extension-runtime-helpers.ts (snapshot/normalize leaf), extension-hook-runtime.ts (executeRegisteredHooks + run*Override/run*Hooks incl. preserved describeHandlerError); loader keeps discovery/activation/createExtensionApi and re-exports. (3) extension.ts -> extension/shared.ts (manifest/validate leaf), extension/managed-state.ts, extension/install-sources.ts; extension.ts keeps runExtension wiring and re-exports. New modules left out of vitest include allowlist. Preserving uncommitted describeHandlerError/errorMessage.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: FINISH: All 3 originals now under 2000 LOC, zero consumer/behavior changes, all gates green. LOC before->after: extension.ts 3352->1712; loader.ts 3231->1929; cli-contracts.ts 3097->1811. New modules: sdk/cli-contracts/{enum-contracts.ts 187, tool-option-contracts.ts 253, tool-parameter-tables.ts 910}; core/extensions/{extension-capability-aliases.ts 194, extension-policy.ts 665, extension-registries.ts 64, extension-runtime-helpers.ts 31, extension-hook-runtime.ts 499}; cli/commands/extension/{shared.ts 129, managed-state.ts 234, install-sources.ts 451, bundled-catalog.ts 300, scaffold.ts 198, doctor.ts 438}. Verification: pnpm build PASS; static-quality-gate PASS (no length/orphan/complexity/dir violations); unit tests 146 passed (extension-loader, extension-command[-github], contracts-command, sdk-index, upgrade, builtin-entrypoints, runtime, item-fields, starter-example); integration 77 passed (cli + cli-inprocess-runner); smoke 'contracts --flags-only' + 'extension --help' OK. Deviations from documented plan: (1) loader split needed two extra leaf modules to stay cycle-free: extension-runtime-helpers.ts (snapshot/normalizeCommandName, shared by loader+hook-runtime+policy) and extension-policy.ts (the ~650-LOC policy normalize/serialize/evaluate block) since capability-aliases+registries+hook-runtime alone only got loader to 2519. (2) cli-contracts added a third module tool-parameter-tables.ts (PM_TOOL_PARAMETER_PROPERTIES/METADATA + PLAN_* tables) because enum+tool-option extraction alone left it at ~2600. (3) extension.ts needed five modules (added scaffold.ts + doctor.ts beyond the documented install-sources/managed-state/bundled-catalog) plus a shared.ts leaf (manifest/validate/normalize helpers) to reach under 2000 cycle-free; bundled-catalog ended up as fs-discovery functions (not a static data table). Preserved describeHandlerError + errorMessage (now in extension-hook-runtime.ts). New modules deliberately kept OUT of vitest include allowlist.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Coordinator verification after sub-agent split: full coverage gate (node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage) caught one governance failure the static gate did not — release-readiness-runtime.spec.ts 'keeps vitest coverage include list aligned with src ts modules' requires every src .ts file to be either in the coverage include list OR in its explicit uncovered allowlist. Added the 14 new split modules (6 under src/cli/commands/extension/, 5 src/core/extensions/extension-*, 3 src/sdk/cli-contracts/*) to that allowlist in sorted order. They stay ungated (consistent with their parent files extension.ts/loader.ts which are include+exclude and cli-contracts.ts which was already uncovered). Coverage percentages remained 100% (1769 passing, only the allowlist test failed pre-fix). Follow-up opportunity: extracted pure logic could later be promoted into the covered include set with dedicated tests.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Final LOC offender fixed: src/cli/commands/test.ts 2017 -> 1841 LOC (under 2000). Extracted the cycle-free linked-test command-detection leaf cluster (9 flag/subcommand Sets + 13 pure parsers: splitNormalizedCommandSegments, stripLeadingEnvAssignments, firstPmSubcommand, isPmExecutableToken, normalizePackageSpecifier, isPmCliPackageToken, isPmCliScriptToken, parseNpxCommand, parseLauncherSubcommand, parsePnpmDlxCommand, parseNpmExecCommand, resolvePmSubcommandContext, firstPositionalToken) into NEW sibling module src/cli/commands/test/linked-command-detection.ts (210 LOC), re-imported by test.ts so no external consumer changes (symbols were module-private; no re-export needed). Added new module to the coverage-allowlist governance test (release-readiness-runtime.spec.ts 'keeps vitest coverage include list aligned' .toEqual array, sorted localeCompare, after test-runs.ts) and NOT to vitest include (stays ungated like test.ts). Verification: pnpm build clean; static-quality-gate PASS; targeted specs PASS (test-command.spec.ts + linked-test-parsers.spec.ts + release-readiness-runtime.spec.ts = 110/110).

patch.value: Barrel-split all four originally-cited command files below 2000 LOC via re-export with zero consumer/behavior change: extension.ts 3352->1712, loader.ts 3231->1929, sdk/cli-contracts.ts 3097->1811, test.ts 2017->1841. Created 15 cohesive sibling modules (under src/cli/commands/extension/, src/core/extensions/extension-*, src/sdk/cli-contracts/*, src/cli/commands/test/). All registered in the coverage uncovered-allowlist governance test. No src .ts file now exceeds 2000 LOC. create.ts/update.ts were already <2000 from pm-why9. Full release gate (17 gates incl. 100% coverage, static, npm-pack, dogfood, sentry-telemetry) green.
All command files now under 2000 LOC via barrel re-export splits; zero consumer/behavior change; full release gate green.
